WellnessFlow.anonymousLine: Your response is anonymous and helps us provide better care.
WellnessFlow.accessCodeSubtitle: Enter the shelter access code to setup device.
WellnessFlow.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
WellnessFlow.shortQuestionsSubtitle: to tell us more about how you feel right now
WellnessFlow.longQuestionsSubtitle: to tell us more about how you've been feeling this past week
WellnessFlow.almostDoneSubtitle: Submit your responses now, or continue with the optional questions you haven't answered yet.
WellnessFlow.longFormSubtitle: All optional — select any answers that apply. Scroll to the bottom to submit.

ShortQuestions.short-1-prompt: Which of these would be most helpful to you right now?
ShortQuestions.short-1-opt-5: A short walk or other physical activity
ShortQuestions.short-2-prompt: What kind of movement feels good or doable for you right now?
ShortQuestions.short-3-prompt: Which activities help you feel like you?

LongQuestions.long-1-prompt: Thinking about your stress levels over the last two weeks, would you say that most days are…
LongQuestions.long-2-prompt: How often have you felt hopeful over the last two weeks?
LongQuestions.long-3-prompt: How has your body felt this week? (Select all that apply)
LongQuestions.long-4-prompt: How would you rate your current access to nutritious food that suits your needs?
LongQuestions.long-5-prompt: How would you rate your sense of belonging in your local community?
LongQuestions.long-6-prompt: Which types of programs would you be interested in? (Select all that apply)
